name: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc.
summary: Business Development Company Regulations. Regulations governing our operation as a BDC and RIC may affect our ability to raise, and the way in which we raise, additional capital or borrow for investment purposes, which may have a negative effect on our growth.
